rationale.R1.2: The revision identifies and addresses the core contradiction between the 'training-free' claim and the actual training procedure.
rationale.RX.1: While the revised text acknowledges the use of labeled data, it doesn't explicitly quantify uncertainty for specific claims or recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: The revision focuses on the requested task (improving the EcoRoute description) and stays within scope.
rationale.RX.4: The revised text does not introduce new errors or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: The revision clarifies the training process but doesn't provide detailed provenance for each change made.
